payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up partial view of a dark brown painted wooden raised-panel two-door cabinet with a central vertical seam, visible wood grain and slightly worn/scuffed finish; the image is edge-cropped and the cabinet appears about 0.8 m from the camera.
